subcodes.first_line: O kindred of that guiding star! Praise be to God that ye have derived light from the Sun of Guidance and have drawn from the Ocean of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ذوی القربای آن نجم هدی الحمد لله از شمس هدایت مقتبس گشتید و از دریای
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @firmness in the Covenant
